mapper.select: /** UsptTaskPartcptsDao.selectList */ select task_partcpts_id ,bsns_plan_doc_id ,partcpts_nm ,chrg_realm_nm ,enc_mbtlnum ,enc_brthdy ,partcptn_rate ,member_id , (select member_nm from cmmt_member cm where cm.member_id = utp.member_id) as member_nm /*회원명 */ ,creator_id ,created_dt ,updater_id ,updated_dt from uspt_task_partcpts utp where 1=1 and bsns_plan_doc_id = #{bsnsPlanDocId}
